description_long: This is a modern, full-sized coach bus with a streamlined, aerodynamic design and a predominantly white exterior. The bus features large, tinted side windows arranged in a continuous row, providing ample visibility for passengers. Distinctive black graphics and branding are visible on the rear side panels, including stylized text and a logo. The front of the bus has a wide, black windshield and a sleek, integrated grille, while the rear displays additional branding and a subtle rear window. The bus rides on six wheels, with two axles at the rear and one at the front, and has multiple roof-mounted ventilation or air conditioning units. The overall appearance suggests a comfortable, long-distance passenger vehicle suitable for urban and intercity travel.
description: A modern, white coach bus with large tinted windows, black graphics, and sleek aerodynamic styling. Features include prominent branding, a wide windshield, and multiple roof units.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide black windshield, integrated grille, and roof-mounted units.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the continuous row of large tinted windows, black graphics, and branding on the rear panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rear window, additional branding, and the bus's taillights.
description_view_3: Right side view with large windows, visible interior screens, and prominent black graphics on the rear panel.
attribute_window_arrangement: Large, rectangular tinted windows arranged in a continuous row along both sides, separated by thin vertical pillars; three main passenger windows per side with additional smaller windows at the front and rear.
attribute_bus_manufacturer_logo: Black stylized logo and text on the rear side panels, featuring a face and the text 'BRACO' and 'bbc'.
